evaluation.summary: The study verifies that simple weight-based constructions yield superadditive and monotonic characteristic functions for N≤4, but offers no novel theoretical insight beyond known properties.
next_directions: apply the framework to stochastic coalition formation with probabilistic weights
compare the weight-based characteristic functions with established solution concepts such as the Shapley value and nucleolus
explore algorithmic generation of coalition values for N>5 and assess scalability
